ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator",
ISCHANGED(StageName),
CASE( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(StageName)), "New Enquiry", 1, "Needs Analysis", 2, "Quote Creation", 3, "Quote Accepted", 4, "Invoiced", 5, "Invoice Paid", 6, "Closed Won", 7, "Closed Lost", 8, 0 ) > CASE( TEXT(StageName), "New Enquiry", 1, "Needs Analysis", 2, "Quote Creation", 3, "Quote Accepted", 4, "Invoiced", 5, "Invoice Paid", 6, "Closed Won", 7, "Closed Lost", 8, 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot move the enquiry stage backwards.
